chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 349 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7858/2023 (C/A) 30.05.2024 Mr. Ali Ahmed Rind, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Abdul Qadir Bhutto, District Health Officer, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG Sindh has filed through a statement compliance report in terms of order dated 15.11.2023, which is taken on record, and copy supplied to learned counsel for petitioner. It seems that this petition, filed for seeking directions to Sindh Health Care Commission for entertaining the complaint filed by petitioner, has served its purpose. In view of above report, listed application is disposed of. However, if petitioner is still aggrieved, he would be at liberty to pursue the proper remedy available to him in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
